response.justification: While Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, there is minimal evidence of deep JVM, Java/Kotlin, or enterprise framework (Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus) expertise — critical for this role. His work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with no clear contributions to IDE tooling, language servers, or JVM-based build/runtime integrations.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and tooling innovation (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven ability to lead and teach through workshops and knowledge sharing
concerns: No demonstrated experience with Java/Kotlin IDE tooling or JVM internals
Lack of visible involvement with Spring, Hibernate, or enterprise build systems
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) does not align with core JVM focus
